calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Recorded by FTR.

Petitioner Rosa Emeralda Zelaya Portillo, the minor's Mother, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
The minor Ashley Amanda Sanchez Zelaya was also present, placed under oath and testified.
Manuel Solano Herrera, the minor's stepfather, was placed under oath and testified.
Proof of Publication on file.
The Court makes a finding that petitioner has performed her due diligence in her efforts to locate the minor's father, but his whereabouts are unknown.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to from Ashley Amanda Sanchez Zelaya to Ashley Amanda Solano Zellaya.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
